allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code} css/reset.css\\n%{http_code} css/variables.css\\n%{http_code} css/style.css\\n%{http_code} js/main.js\\n" http://localhost:8080/css/reset.css http://localhost:8080/css/variables.css http://localhost:8080/css/style.css http://localhost:8080/js/main.js)
